service_id.description: Global ROS path of the service. Use `"--list"` for `service_id` to get a list of available services and their schema (and pass empty array for `arguments`)

arguments.description: A list of arguments to pass to the service. Use `["--list"]` to get a list of available arguments in the `service-type-map` section

return_type.description: The return type for the response, defaults to JSON

tensorfleet-project-path.description: Tensorfleet project directory path. The directory should contain both .tensorfleet and .env files at its root

top_filter.description: Top-level filter to apply to the query
